measures.name: Cumulative Revenue
measures.expression:
IF(
    ISINSCOPE('QBS_SighCast_Item'[Category1]),
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales Val],
        TOPN([Product Rank],
        ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Item'[Category1]),
        [Sales Val])
    ),
    [Total Sales Val])

measures.name: Cutoff Cumulative Revenue
measures.expression:
Var ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Product
measures.expression:
Var TargetPercentage = [Pareto Value]
Var ClosestProduct =
    TOPN(
        1,
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            SUMMARIZE(
                ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Sales'),
                QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]
            ),
            "CumulativeRevenuePercentage",[Cumulative Revenue %],
            "Difference",ABS([Cumulative Revenue %] - TargetPercentage)
        ),
        [Difference],ASC
    )
    RETURN
    MAXX(
        ClosestProduct,
        QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]
    )

measures.name: Cutoff Rank
measures.expression:
VAR closesProduct = [Cutoff Product]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]) = closesProduct,
    [Product Rank],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue %
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue %],
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue GT%
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product]
RETURN
IF(SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1])=ClosestProduct,
[Sales Val],
BLANK()
)/4

measures.name: Product Grouping
measures.expression:
VAR ProductRevPct =
CALCULATE([Cumulative Revenue %],
ALLEXCEPT('QBS_SighCast_Item',QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1])
)
RETURN
IF(ProductRevPct <= [Pareto Value],VALUES(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]),"Others")

measures.name: % of Grand Filtered Total Brand
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Sales QTY Ton],
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales QTY Ton],
        ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Item')
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: % of Grand Filtered Total Segment
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Sales QTY Ton],
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales QTY Ton],
        ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Customer'[Category])
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: 3MOM Filters
measures.expression: ABS([Sales Current Month Val]) + ABS([Sales Previous Month Val]) + ABS([Sales Before Previous Month Val])

measures.name: Actual Sales Value
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
        CALCULATE(
            [SalesBeforeTax],
            FILTER(
                DateDim,
                YEAR(DateDim[Date]) = YEAR(TODAY()) &&
                MONTH(DateDim[Date]) = MONTH(TODAY())
            )
        ),
        1000
    )

measures.name: BasketSize
Current_O_Before_Previous Ratio
measures.expression: ([Sales Current Month Val] / [Sales Before Previous Month Val]  )

measures.name: Current_O_Previous Ratio
measures.expression: ([Sales Current Month Val] / [Sales Previous Month Val])

measures.name: DMoM Change
measures.expression: [Sales DCurrent Month QTY] - [Sales DPrevious Month QTY]

measures.name: DMoM Ratio
DropSize
Growth-Sales-Monthly
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Actual Sales Value] - [Sales Previous Month Val],
    [Sales Previous Month Val],
    0
)

measures.name: Growth-Sales-Yearly
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Actual Sales Value] - [Sales Value Past Year],
    [Sales Value Past Year],
    0
)

measures.name: LinePerCall
Lost Opportunities
measures.expression:
VAR TargetVal = [SalesBeforeTax]      -- replace with your Target measure
VAR ActualVal = [SalesBeforeTax]      -- your Actual measure
RETURN
MAX( TargetVal - ActualVal, 0 )

measures.name: MoM % Growth
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Sales DCurrent Month QTY] - [Sales DPrevious Month QTY],
    [Sales DPrevious Month QTY],
    1
)

measures.name: MoM Change
measures.expression: [Sales DCurrent Month QTY] - [Sales DPrevious Month QTY]

measures.name: MOM Filters
measures.expression: ABS([Sales DCurrent Month QTY]) + ABS([Sales DPrevious Month QTY])

measures.name: MoM Ratio
measures.expression: ([Sales DCurrent Month QTY] / [Sales DPrevious Month QTY])

measures.name: Pareto Customer Cumulative % QTY
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentCustomer = MAX ( QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo] )
VAR Result =
    DIVIDE (
        SUMX (
            FILTER (
                ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo] ),
                [Sales QTY Ton] >= CALCULATE ( [Sales QTY Ton], QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo] = CurrentCustomer )
            ),
            [Sales QTY Ton]
        ),
        CALCULATE ( [Sales QTY Ton], ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Customer ) )
    )
RETURN Result

measures.name: Pareto Item Cumulative % QTY
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentItem = MAX ( QBS_SighCast_Item[ItemNo] )
VAR Result =
    DIVIDE (
        SUMX (
            FILTER (
                ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Item[ItemNo] ),
                [Sales QTY Ton] >= CALCULATE ( [Sales QTY Ton], QBS_SighCast_Item[ItemNo] = CurrentItem )
            ),
            [Sales QTY Ton]
        ),
        CALCULATE ( [Sales QTY Ton], ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Item) )
    )
RETURN Result

measures.name: Sales Before Previous Month QTY
measures.expression:
VAR SelMaxDate =
    MAX('DateDim'[Date])

VAR TodayOrSel =
    MIN(SelMaxDate, TODAY())

-- Current month start
VAR CurrentStartDate =
    CALCULATE(
        MIN('DateDim'[Date]),
        FILTER(
            ALL('DateDim'),
            YEAR('DateDim'[Date]) = YEAR(TodayOrSel)
            && MONTH('DateDim'[Date]) = MONTH(TodayOrSel)
        )
    )

-- Is current month complete?
VAR IsMonthComplete =
    TodayOrSel = EOMONTH(TodayOrSel, 0)

-- Previous month start
VAR PreviousStartDate =
    CALCULATE(
        MIN('DateDim'[Date]),
        FILTER(
            ALL('DateDim'),
            YEAR('DateDim'[Date]) = YEAR( EDATE(CurrentStartDate, -1) )
            && MONTH('DateDim'[Date]) = MONTH( EDATE(CurrentStartDate, -2) )
        )
    )

-- If incomplete: same day in previous month (safe)
VAR SameDayPrevMonth =
VAR TargetDay = DAY(TodayOrSel)
VAR PrevYear  = YEAR(PreviousStartDate)
VAR PrevMonth = MONTH(PreviousStartDate)
VAR Try =
    DATE(PrevYear, PrevMonth, TargetDay)
RETURN
    IF(
        MONTH(Try) = PrevMonth,
        Try,
        EOMONTH(TodayOrSel, -2)
    )

-- Final PreviousEndDate:
VAR PreviousEndDate =
    IF(
        IsMonthComplete,
        EOMONTH(TodayOrSel, -2),     -- full previous month
        SameDayPrevMonth             -- same day logic
    )

-- Calculate Qty
VAR Prev =
    CALCULATE(
        [Sales QTY Ton],
        DATESBETWEEN(
            'DateDim'[Date],
            PreviousStartDate,
            PreviousEndDate
        )
    )

RETURN IF(Prev = 0, 0, Prev)

-- If incomplete: same day in previous month (safe)

measures.name: Sales Value Past Year
measures.expression:
CALCULATE(
    [SalesBeforeTax],
    FILTER(
        ALL(DateDim),
        DateDim[Date] >= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, MONTH(TODAY()), 1) &&
        DateDim[Date] <= DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, MONTH(TODAY()), DAY(TODAY()))
    )
)

measures.name: SalesChange
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentMonthSales =
    [SalesBeforeTax]

VAR PreviousMonthSales =
    CALCULATE(
        [SalesBeforeTax],
        DATEADD(DateDim[Date], -1, MONTH)
    )

RETURN
IF(
    NOT ISBLANK(PreviousMonthSales),
    DIVIDE(
        CurrentMonthSales - PreviousMonthSales,
        PreviousMonthSales
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: SalesChange_Day
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    CALCULATE([SalesBeforeTax]) -
    CALCULATE([SalesBeforeTax], DATEADD(DateDim[Date], -1, DAY)),
    CALCULATE([SalesBeforeTax], DATEADD(DateDim[Date], -1, DAY)),
    0
)

measures.name: SalesChange_Week
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentWeekSales =
    CALCULATE(
         [SalesBeforeTax],
        ALLEXCEPT(DateDim, DateDim[WeekNumber], DateDim[Year])
    )

VAR PrevWeekSales =
    CALCULATE(
         [SalesBeforeTax],
        FILTER(
            ALL(DateDim),
            DateDim[Year] = MAX(DateDim[Year]) &&
            DateDim[WeekNumber] = MAX(DateDim[WeekNumber]) - 1
        )
    )

RETURN
    DIVIDE(CurrentWeekSales - PrevWeekSales, PrevWeekSales)

measures.name: SalesChange_WeekAndDay
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentDate = MAX( DateDim[Date] )
VAR CurrentWeek = MAX( DateDim[WeekNumber] )
VAR CurrentYear = MAX( DateDim[Year] )

VAR CurrentDaySales =
    CALCULATE(
         [SalesBeforeTax],
        FILTER( ALLSELECTED( DateDim ), DateDim[Date] = CurrentDate )
    )

VAR PrevDaySales =
    CALCULATE(
         [SalesBeforeTax],
        DATEADD( DateDim[Date], -1, DAY )
    )

VAR PrevWeekSales =
    CALCULATE(
        [SalesBeforeTax],
        FILTER(
            ALL( DateDim ),
            ( DateDim[Year] = CurrentYear && DateDim[WeekNumber] = CurrentWeek - 1 )
            || ( DateDim[Year] = CurrentYear - 1 && DateDim[WeekNumber] = 52 && CurrentWeek = 1 )
        )
    )

VAR DayChange =
    DIVIDE( CurrentDaySales - PrevDaySales, PrevDaySales, 0 )

VAR WeekChange =
    DIVIDE( CurrentDaySales - PrevWeekSales, PrevWeekSales, 0 )

RETURN
    DayChange + WeekChange

measures.name: Route per Segment
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentSegment = SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Customer[Branchid])
VAR CustomersInSegment =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES(QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo]),
        QBS_SighCast_Customer[Branchid] = CurrentSegment
    )
VAR JourneyPlansForCustomers =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES(QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[JPID]),
        QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[CustomerID] IN CustomersInSegment
    )
VAR RoutesForSegment =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES(QBS_SighCast_JourneyPlan[RouteID]),
        QBS_SighCast_JourneyPlan[JPID] IN JourneyPlansForCustomers
    )
RETURN
COUNTROWS(RoutesForSegment)

measures.name: Sales vs Segment Ratio
measures.expression:
VAR Ratio = DIVIDE(
     [SalesBeforeTax],
    [Average Sales per Segment]
)

RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    ISBLANK(Ratio), BLANK(),
    Ratio < 0.3, "Need Improvement",
    Ratio > 2.0, "Change Segment",
    "Maintain"
)

measures.name: Segments Per Route
measures.expression:
VAR Salesman = SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Salesman[SalesmanNo])
VAR CustomersInRoute =
    CALCULATETABLE(
        VALUES(QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo]),
        FILTER(
            ALL(QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer),
            QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[JPID] IN
                CALCULATETABLE(
                    VALUES(QBS_SighCast_JourneyPlan[JPID]),
                    QBS_SighCast_Salesman[SalesmanNo] = Salesman
                )
        )
    )
RETURN
CALCULATE(
    DISTINCTCOUNT(QBS_SighCast_Customer[Branchid]),
    KEEPFILTERS(QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo] IN CustomersInRoute)
)

measures.name: MTDTargetQTY
measures.expression:
(VAR TotalQTYTarget =
    [Target QTY]
VAR TotalWorkingDays =
    [TotalWorkingDays]
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( TotalQTYTarget, TotalWorkingDays )) * [ActualWorkingDaysToDate]

measures.name: MTDTargetVal
measures.expression:
(VAR TotalValTarget =
    [Target Val]
VAR TotalWorkingDays =
    [TotalWorkingDays]
RETURN
    DIVIDE ( TotalValTarget, TotalWorkingDays )) * [ActualWorkingDaysToDate]

measures.name: Target Vs Sales Daily QTY %%
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    SUM(QBS_SighCast_Sales[BaseQty]),
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(QBS_SighCast_Target[Target]),
        FILTER(
            QBS_SighCast_Target,
            QBS_SighCast_Target[Targetid] = -3
        ),
        VALUES(QBS_SighCast_Sales[DueDate])
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: Break Avg
measures.expression:
VAR TotalMinutes = [Break]   
VAR Hours = INT ( TotalMinutes / 60 )
VAR Minutes = MOD ( TotalMinutes, 60 )
RETURN
FORMAT ( Hours, "00" ) & ":" & FORMAT ( Minutes, "00" )

measures.name: CI/CO Avg
measures.expression:
VAR TotalMinutes = AVERAGE(QBS_SighCast_Time_To_Sell[CI/CO])   
VAR Hours = INT ( TotalMinutes / 60 )
VAR Minutes = MOD ( TotalMinutes, 60 )
RETURN
FORMAT ( Hours, "00" ) & ":" & FORMAT ( Minutes, "00" )

measures.name: ActualWorkingDaysToDate
RemainingWorkingDays
measures.expression:
VAR ActualWorkingDaysToDate = [ActualWorkingDaysToDate]  
    VAR TotalWorkingDays = SUM(DateDim[IsWorkingDayVal]) 
    RETURN
    ABS(ActualWorkingDaysToDate - TotalWorkingDays)

measures.name: ShowValueForDates
CustomerRetentionRate
Negative VisitsUnique
Planned Visits
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDay = SELECTEDVALUE ( 'DateDim'[Date] )
VAR IsSingleDate = NOT ISBLANK ( SelectedDay )
VAR WeekDayName = FORMAT ( SelectedDay, "ddd" )

RETURN
IF (
    IsSingleDate,
    -- Case 1: One specific date selected
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),
        WeekDayName = "Sat", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[sat] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Sun", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[sun] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Mon", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[mon] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Tue", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[tue] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Wed", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[wed] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Thu", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[thu] = 1 ) ) ),
        WeekDayName = "Fri", CALCULATE ( COUNTROWS ( FILTER ( QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer, QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[fri] = 1 ) ) ),
        BLANK()
    ),

    -- Case 2: Month or multiple days selected
    CALCULATE (
        SUMX (
            ADDCOLUMNS (
                QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer,
                "DaysCount",
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[sat] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[sun] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[mon] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[tue] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[wed] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[thu] +
                    QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[fri]
            ),
            [DaysCount] * QBS_SighCast_JPCustomer[Frequency]
        )
    )
)

measures.name: Positive VisitsUnique
Contribution %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Gross Profit],
    CALCULATE ( [Gross Profit], ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[ItemID] ) ),
    0
)

measures.name: Cumulative Sales
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentRank = [Sales Rank]
RETURN
CALCULATE (
    [Actual Val EGP],
    FILTER (
        ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[ItemID] ),
        [Sales Rank] <= CurrentRank
    )
)

measures.name: Cumulative Sales %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Cumulative Sales],
    CALCULATE ( [Actual Val EGP], ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[ItemID] ) ),
    0
)

measures.name: Gross Margin %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE(
    [Gross Profit],
    [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
    0
)

measures.name: Gross Profit EGP
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[LineTotal] ) - SUM ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[COGS] ),
    QBS_SighCast_Sales[Currency] = "EGP"
)

measures.name: Gross Profit EUR
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    SUM ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[LineTotal] ) - SUM ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[COGS] ),
    QBS_SighCast_Sales[Currency] = "EUR"
)

measures.name: Gross Profit Growth %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Gross Profit] - CALCULATE ( [Gross Profit], DATEADD ( 'DateDim'[Date], -1, YEAR ) ),
    CALCULATE ( [Gross Profit], DATEADD ( 'DateDim'[Date], -1, YEAR ) )
)

measures.name: Portfolio Class
measures.expression:
SWITCH (
    TRUE (),
    [Cumulative Sales %] <= 0.8, "A – Core Portfolio",
    [Cumulative Sales %] <= 0.95, "B – Support",
    "C – Tail / Review"
)

measures.name: Sales Rank
measures.expression:
RANKX (
    ALL ( QBS_SighCast_Sales[Item_Number] ),
    [Actual Val EGP],
    ,
    DESC,
    DENSE
)

measures.name: Daily Inventory Balance
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentDate =
    MAX(DateDim[Date])
VAR LastTransDate =
    CALCULATE(
        MAX(SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[ProductionDate]),
        ALL(SAP_VW_InventoryBalance)
    )
RETURN
IF(
    CurrentDate <= LastTransDate,
    CALCULATE(
        SUM(SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[OnHandQtyPrimaryUOM]),
        FILTER(
            ALL(DateDim),
            DateDim[Date] <= CurrentDate
        )
    )
)

measures.name: Months To Expire
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDate =
    MAX ( SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[ExpirationDate] )
VAR TotalDays =
    DATEDIFF ( SelectedDate, TODAY(), MONTH )
RETURN
TotalDays

measures.name: PastDays From Production
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDate =
    MAX ( SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[ProductionDate] )
RETURN
IF (
    SelectedDate <= TODAY(),
    DATEDIFF ( SelectedDate, TODAY(), DAY ),
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: PastMonths From Production
measures.expression:
VAR SelectedDate =
    MAX ( SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[ProductionDate] )
VAR TotalDays =
    DATEDIFF ( SelectedDate, TODAY(), DAY )
RETURN
IF (
    SelectedDate <= TODAY(),
    INT ( TotalDays / 30.44 ),
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Shortage Qty
measures.expression:
VAR OnHand = [On Hand Qty]
VAR MinStock = MAX ( QBS_SighCast_Item[MinimumStock] )
RETURN
IF (
    OnHand < MinStock,
    MinStock - OnHand,
    0
)

measures.name: Slow Moving Inventory
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Inventory Value],
    FILTER (
        SAP_VW_InventoryBalance,
        DATEDIFF (
            SAP_VW_InventoryBalance[ProductionDate],
            TODAY(),
            DAY
        ) > 180
    )
)

measures.name: Stock to Sales Ratio
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    [Average Inventory Value],
    [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate]
)

measures.name: Baseline Sales AVG
measures.expression:
VAR AnchorDate =
    COALESCE (
        MAX ( DateDim[Date] ),
        TODAY ()
    )

VAR Sales = CALCULATE (
        [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
    QBS_SighCast_Sales[PromotionsTotal] = 0,
    REMOVEFILTERS ( DateDim ),
    DateDim[Date] > EDATE ( AnchorDate, -3 ),
    DateDim[Date] <= AnchorDate

    )

RETURN
    COALESCE ( Sales/3 , 0 )

measures.name: Customer Baseline Sales
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Customer Monthly Sales EGP],
    DATEADD ( 'DateDim'[Date], -1, MONTH )
)

measures.name: Customer Incremental Sales AVG
measures.expression: [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate] - [Baseline Sales AVG]

measures.name: Customer Promotion Segment
measures.expression:
SWITCH (
    TRUE(),

    [Customer Promotion Value] = 0, 
    "No Promotion Given",

    [Customer Incremental Sales] <= 0,
    "Discount Addicted – لا يستحق",

    [Customer Promotion ROI] < 1,
    "Low ROI – راجع السياسة",

    [Customer Promotion ROI] >= 1
        && [Customer Incremental Sales] > 0,
    "High Value – يستحق",

    "Review"
)

measures.name: Non-Promo Sales
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
    QBS_SighCast_Sales[PromotionsTotal] = 0
)

measures.name: Promo Sales
measures.expression:
CALCULATE (
    [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
    QBS_SighCast_Sales[PromotionsTotal] <> 0
)

measures.name: Promotion Effectiveness Index
measures.expression:
VAR Participation = [Participation Rate %]
VAR PromoSales = [Promo Sales]
VAR Discount = [Total Promotion Value]
RETURN
IF (
    Discount > 0,
    ( PromoSales / Discount ) * Participation,
    0
)

measures.name: Promotion Rate %
measures.expression:
VAR Rate = DIVIDE([Total Promotion Value], [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate], 0) * -1
RETURN
    IF(ISBLANK(Rate), 0, Rate)

measures.name: PromotionSegment
measures.expression:
VAR PromoRate = [Promotion Rate %]  -- assuming decimal form, e.g., 0.05 for 5%
RETURN
SWITCH(
    TRUE(),
    PromoRate >= 0 && PromoRate <= 0.05, "0% to 5%",
    PromoRate > 0.05 && PromoRate <= 0.10, "6% to 10%",
    PromoRate > 0.10 && PromoRate <= 0.15, "11% to 15%",
    PromoRate > 0.15, "16% or Higher",
    "No Segment"
)

measures.name: PromotionTotal
measures.expression:
VAR Total = SUM(QBS_SighCast_Sales[PromotionsTotal])
RETURN
    IF(ISBLANK(Total), 0, Total)

measures.name: Total Promotion Value
measures.expression:
VAR Total = SUM(QBS_SighCast_Sales[PromotionsTotal])
RETURN
    IF(ISBLANK(Total), 0, Total)

measures.name: Customer Avg 6 Months Sales
measures.expression:
VAR Last6Months =
    DATESINPERIOD (
        'DateDim'[Date],
        MAX ( 'DateDim'[Date] ),
        -6,
        MONTH
    )
VAR ActiveMonths =
    COUNTROWS (
        FILTER (
            Last6Months,
            CALCULATE ( [Customer Monthly Sales EGP] ) <> 0
        )
    )
RETURN
IF (
    ActiveMonths = 0,
    BLANK (),
    DIVIDE (
        CALCULATE ( [Customer Monthly Sales EGP], Last6Months ),
        6
    )
)

measures.name: Customer Incremental Sales_1
measures.expression:
[Customer Monthly Sales EGP]
    - CALCULATE (
        [Customer Monthly Sales EGP],
        DATEADD ( 'DateDim'[Date], -6, MONTH )
      )

measures.name: Customer Investable Flag
measures.expression:
IF (
    [Customer Promotion Value] > 0
        && [Customer Incremental Sales] > 0
        && [Customer Promotion ROI] >= 1.5
        && [Customer Avg 6 Months Sales] > 0,
    1,
    0
)

measures.name: % of Total 2
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],[Total Sales Val])

measures.name: Cumulative Revenue 2
measures.expression:
IF(
    ISINSCOPE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]),
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
        TOPN([Product Rank 2],
        ALLSELECTED(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]),
        [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate])
    ),
    [Total Sales Val])

measures.name: Cumulative Revenue 3
measures.expression:
IF(
    ISINSCOPE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]),
    CALCULATE(
        [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
        TOPN([Product Rank 3],
        ALLSELECTED(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]),
        [Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate])
    ),
    [Total Sales Val])

measures.name: Cutoff Cumulative Revenue 2
measures.expression:
Var ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 2]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category1]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue 2],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Cumulative Revenue 3
measures.expression:
Var ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 3]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue 3],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Product 2
measures.expression:
Var TargetPercentage = [Pareto Value]
Var ClosestProduct =
    TOPN(
        1,
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            SUMMARIZE(
                ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Sales'),
                QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]
            ),
            "CumulativeRevenuePercentage",[Cumulative Revenue % 2],
            "Difference",ABS([Cumulative Revenue % 2] - TargetPercentage)
        ),
        [Difference],ASC
    )
    RETURN
    MAXX(
        ClosestProduct,
        QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]
    )

measures.name: Cutoff Product 3
measures.expression:
Var TargetPercentage = [Pareto Value]
Var ClosestProduct =
    TOPN(
        1,
        ADDCOLUMNS(
            SUMMARIZE(
                ALLSELECTED('QBS_SighCast_Sales'),
                QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]
            ),
            "CumulativeRevenuePercentage",[Cumulative Revenue % 3],
            "Difference",ABS([Cumulative Revenue % 3] - TargetPercentage)
        ),
        [Difference],ASC
    )
    RETURN
    MAXX(
        ClosestProduct,
        QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]
    )

measures.name: Cutoff Rank 2
measures.expression:
VAR closesProduct = [Cutoff Product 2]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]) = closesProduct,
    [Product Rank 2],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Rank 3
measures.expression:
VAR closesProduct = [Cutoff Product 3]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]) = closesProduct,
    [Product Rank 3],
    blank()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue % 2
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 2]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue % 2],
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue % 3
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 3]
RETURN
IF(
    SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3]) = ClosestProduct,
    [Cumulative Revenue % 3],
    BLANK()
)

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue GT% 2
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 2]
RETURN
IF(SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category2])=ClosestProduct,
[Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
BLANK()
)/4

measures.name: Cutoff Revenue GT% 3
measures.expression:
VAR ClosestProduct = [Cutoff Product 3]
RETURN
IF(SELECTEDVALUE(QBS_SighCast_Item[Category3])=ClosestProduct,
[Total Sales Value with ExchangeRate],
BLANK()
)/4

measures.name: Product Rank 2
Product Rank 3
Total Sales Val 2
Revenue Mix %
Financing Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Financing ] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Growth_(COGS)
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [Total COGS_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Growth_Industrial Cost
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [Total industrial Cost_M]
                * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Growth_Net Profit Audit
measures.expression: [Growth_Gross Profit] - [Growth_Supply Chain] - SUM('Analysis Profitability'[Total Site OH]) - SUM( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Sales & MKT]) - SUM('Analysis Profitability'[Total G&A]) - SUM('Analysis Profitability'[Total Financing ]) + SUM('Analysis Profitability'[Total Other Revenue])

measures.name: Growth_Net Profit Audit %
measures.expression: DIVIDE([Growth_Net Profit Audit] ,[Growth_Net Sales After Discount],0)

measures.name: Growth_Net Sales After Discount
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [Net Sales_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Growth_NSPO 8%
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [NSPO 8 %_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Growth_Q/Ton
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [Total Q/Ton_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Growth_Supply Chain
measures.expression:
SUMX (
    VALUES ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] ),
    SWITCH (
        TRUE(),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "9*9",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (9*9)] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "13*13",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (13*13) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "10*10",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (10*10) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7*7",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7*7) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "7.5*7.5",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (7.5*7.5) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "Crinkle",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (Crinkle) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "HB",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (HB) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "MIX",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (MIX) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "STH",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (STH) Value] / 100 ),

        'Analysis Profitability'[Cut] = "WEDGES",
            [Supply Chain_M] * ( 1 + [Volume Growth % (WEDGES) Value] / 100 )
    )
)

measures.name: Income Tax Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Incom tax ] ),
    CALCULATE (
        SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
        ALLSELECTED ( 'Analysis Profitability' )
    ),
    0
)

measures.name: Indirect Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    (SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total industrial Cost] ) + SUM('Analysis Profitability'[NSPO 8%])),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Industrial Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    (SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total industrial Cost] )),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Net Profit Audit %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Profit Audit] ),
        SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] )
  ,  0
)

measures.name: NP Before Other %
measures.expression:
VAR NetSales =
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] )

VAR TotalCosts =
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Material (COGS)] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total industrial Cost] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[NSPO 8%] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total supply chain cost] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Site OH] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Sales & MKT] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total G&A] )
        + SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Financing ] )

RETURN
IF (
    NetSales > 0
        && TotalCosts <> 0,
    1 - DIVIDE ( TotalCosts, NetSales ),
    BLANK ()
)

measures.name: NSPO 8 %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[NSPO 8%] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Sales & MKT %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Sales & MKT] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Supply Chain  %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    (SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total supply chain cost] ) ),
  
        SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
  
    0
)

measures.name: Total G&A Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total G&A] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] )
)

measures.name: Total Material (COGS) %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Material (COGS)] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Total Other Revenue Cost %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Other Revenue] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Total Site OH %
measures.expression:
DIVIDE (
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Total Site OH] ),
    SUM ( 'Analysis Profitability'[Net Sales After Discount] ),
    0
)

measures.name: Customer Balance Closing
measures.expression:
VAR CurrentCustomer =
    SELECTEDVALUE ( QBS_SighCast_Customer[CustomerNo] )
VAR CurrentCurr =
    SELECTEDVALUE ( QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding[INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE] )
VAR PeriodLastDate =
    MAX ( DateDim1[Date] )
RETURN
        CALCULATE (
            SUM ( QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding[INVOICE_AMOUNT] ),
            FILTER (
                ALL ( QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding ),
                QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding[CUSTOMER_ID] = CurrentCustomer
                    && QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding[INVOICE_DATE] <= PeriodLastDate
                    && ( ISBLANK ( CurrentCurr )
                         || QBS_SighCast_CustomerOutStanding
[INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE] = CurrentCurr )
            )
        )
